description: Phase 3 sub-phase 3.2: ship gatherExecutionContext primitive — library + pi tool + orchestrator script + 7 tests. Closes FGAP-031. Closure-table dependency: per-test fixtures own synthetic relations.json.
acceptance_criteria: gatherExecutionContext(cwd, args) library function exported from new packages/pi-context/src/execution-context.ts; returns ContextBundle | {error: string}

Library body: reads unit via resolveItemById; reads context-contract via filterBlockItems(cwd, 'context-contracts', {field: 'unit_kind', op: 'eq', value: kind}); iterates bundle_relation_types[] walking edges per direction (walkAncestors / walkDescendants / findReferences) within max_depth; resolves reached ids via resolveItemsByIds; returns ContextBundle with unit + perRelationType + traversal_depth + scoped_at
gather-execution-context pi tool registered in index.ts with Type.Object({unitId, kind, maxDepth?})
7 tests per per-test fixture pattern: happy path / multi-relation / direction semantic / max_depth bound / missing unit / missing contract / empty bundle_relation_types
notes: CLOSED at HEAD 6bea7e1. gatherExecutionContext library + ContextBundle types + gather-execution-context pi tool + scripts/orchestrator/gather-execution-context.ts + tsconfig path mapping shipped. Tests: pi-context 447 → 454 (+7). FGAP-031 closure pending sub-phase 3.3 (will transition FGAP-031 status to closed in VER-013 cascade). See VER-011.
